Summary
Computer Science undergraduate at NIT Kurukshetra with expertise in Data Structures & Algorithms, distributed
backend systems, and full-stack web development. Skilled in designing scalable, low-latency applications using
Node.js, Express.js, React.js, MongoDB, Redis, BullMQ, RAG and Gemini API. Strong competitive programming
background with 1800+ solved problems and consistent performance in national and international programming
contests. Passionate about solving complex engineering challenges, optimizing system performance, and building
reliable software at scale.

bsite featuring an AI assistant powered by Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to

– Built a custom semantic search pipeline by parsing and chunking structured knowledge, generating vector embeddings, and
retrieving relevant context using cosine similarity before LLM inference.
– Designed a modular knowledge base using JSON documents and PDF parsing, enabling accurate retrieval across projects,
achievements, resume, and technical skills without hardcoded responses.

goDB, JWT, REST APIGitHub – Live
– Architected and developed a real-time multiplayer chess platform supporting room-based matchmaking, concurrent game
sessions, and synchronized gameplay across distributed clients.
– Designed a server-authoritative game engine that enforces legal moves, turn management, check/checkmate detection, and
consistent board-state synchronization using WebSocket communication.
– Implemented secure JWT-based authentication, protected routes, and persistent user management with MongoDB, enabling
authenticated multiplayer gameplay and session handling.
